_reviewOnly: This manifest is a review/evidence artifact only. It is NOT the production manifest for tile_farm_water_base (only the water_a variant exists here; water_b and the shimmer clip frames do not exist yet) and its output is NOT a runtime asset. Do not load target.outputPath in Phaser or reference it from a production manifest.
_sourceNote: The approved runtime master is a 16x16 PNG that already passed ChatGPT's visual audit (docs/art-pipeline/review/tile_farm_water_base_water_a/water_a.approved-master-16x16.png, identical to the originally attached water_a_candidate3_16x16.png). Per the repository's documented Approved Runtime Master workflow, the original AI-generated high-resolution image was deliberately NOT used as the production source. assets/source/generated/tile_farm_water_base/water_a.png is instead a canonical high-resolution source produced by exact 64x nearest-neighbour block-replication of the approved 16x16 master (scripts/upscale-nearest-neighbor.mjs) so the pipeline has a normal high-resolution source input; it introduces no new pixel information beyond the approved master.
